title: Citrusy Turkish Tomato Stir-fry
description: A quick-fix keto-friendly Turkish dish featuring citrusy vine tomatoes and a spicy bhuna sauce, perfect for a meal or snack.

ingredients.name: 1 tsp dried mint
ingredients.notes: or fresh mint leaves, finely chopped

instructions: Heat olive oil in a pan over medium-high heat.
Add cherry tomatoes and cook until they start to burst, about 3 minutes.
Stir in red bell pepper, onions, garlic, dried mint, and coriander. Cook for an additional 5-7 minutes until vegetables are softened but not mushy.
Squeeze lime juice over the mixture.
Drizzle orange juice over vegetables and stir gently to combine with all other ingredients.
Serve immediately as a light snack or meal complement.
